name: Abandoned Supermarket
description: A pre-war grocery chain. Shelves mostly stripped but the back stockroom is untouched.

name: Rusted Highway Bridge
description: Raiders have a toll post here. Sneak under or fight through — either way, good scrap above.

name: The Glowing Crater
description: A bomb site still hot with radiation. Rare pre-war tech scattered everywhere.

name: Vault 31 Entrance
description: The blast door is cracked open. Nobody who went in came back out. Legendary gear awaits.

name: Mutant Swamplands
description: Toxic wetlands overrun by feral ghouls and giant insects. Medicine and food are plentiful.
